prompt:
Use my uploaded portrait only as the identity reference for facial features, face shape, hairstyle, hairline, skin tone, and real-person presence. Do not copy the face, identity, ethnicity, or gender expression from the reference image. Recreate the uploaded person as a realistic cinematic nomadic warrior-style portrait on a black horse, inspired by the reference image. The person is seated on the horse in a calm, powerful pose, holding a traditional bow, facing slightly toward the camera with a composed expression. Keep the horse large in the foreground on the right side, with the rider positioned slightly left of center. Use a dramatic low-to-mid camera angle, close portrait framing, vertical composition. The outfit should follow the reference style: layered red and black embroidered riding robes, fur-trimmed sleeves and collar, ornate belt, colorful bead necklaces, turquoise and silver head accessories, feather details, and handcrafted ethnic-style ornaments. Adapt the hairstyle accessories naturally without changing the uploaded person’s original hairstyle and hairline. Keep the clothing highly detailed but realistic, with natural fabric weight, fur texture, metal reflections, and believable interaction with the riding pose. Background: dark cloudy sky, distant mountains, cold outdoor atmosphere, moody cinematic lighting, slightly underexposed environment, soft natural daylight mixed with dramatic shadow. The image should feel like a real high-end editorial photograph, not fantasy illustration. Keep the uploaded person highly recognizable, with natural skin texture, realistic facial structure, real hair detail, and no AI-plastic smoothing. No watermark, no logo, no text.

Negative Prompt: watermark, logo, text, Doubao watermark, anime style, cartoon face, doll-like face, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, fake skin texture, unrealistic eyes, distorted face, wrong identity, copied reference face, face swap look, bad hands, extra fingers, deformed body, unrealistic horse anatomy, blurry face, low quality, over-polished CGI, fantasy game render, excessive makeup, incorrect lighting, pasted face effect.
